message:
Major expansion of storage, events, notifications, and runtime

- storage.rs: Add 305+ lines implementing batch operations, transaction
  support, migration framework, compression for large entries, cleanup
  policies with retention periods
- events.rs: Add 100+ lines expanding event types, filtering, aggregation,
  and time-window queries for analytics
- notifications.rs: Add 60+ lines implementing notification routing,
  priority handling, and deduplication
- runtime.rs: Extend runtime with lifecycle hooks and resource tracking
- tui/query.rs: Add query builder for complex TUI searches

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
